meaning: adj.不均一的,多相的,杂拼的,异成分的,[数]非齐次的
examples: The distribution of seismicity is inhomogenous and unsteady in space and time respectively.
The distribution of seismicity is inhomogenous and unsteady in space and in time respectively.
Gaussian beam (GB) method is a high-frequency asymptotic method of computing wave-fields in inhomogenous media.
